calendar.matters:
ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing Bond For Successor Trustee
Off Calendar Dec-03-2021 Off Calendar

PETITION FOR APPOINTMENT OF SUCCESSOR TRUSTEE
Off Calendar Nov-01-2021 Granted Per Written Order

PETITION TO TRANSFER TO LOS ANGELES COUNTY
Off Calendar Apr-29-2013 Denied

Petition To Eliminae Or Substantially Reduce Bond
Off Calendar Apr-29-2013 Denied
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Richard Wise for Remainder Beneficiaries. M. Hope Aguilar for Patrick O'Reilly.

Ms. Aguilar reported that there are no assets in Northern California and that only counsel for the remaining beneficiaries is located in Northern California. Mr. Wise argued that given the history of this case and for the stability of the estate the case should remain in San Francisco. The Petition to Transfer to Los Angeles County is denied. The Court gives the option to Ms. Aguilar to either agree to no hypothecation toward the trust or keep the $1,000,000.00 dollar bond. Ms. Aguilar requests to keep the bond as is. The Petition to Eliminate or Reduce Bond is denied. Mr. Wise is to prepare a form of order.

Judge: Lillian K. Sing. Clerk: Nancy Bautista/Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy M. Benton.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing Of Bond
Off Calendar Apr-17-2013 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Payment Of Bond Premium
Off Calendar Apr-15-2013 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Hope Aguilar (appearing by Court Call) for Dwight Reilly. Richard Wise for RemainderPeople. Paul Fazio (Bondsman) was also present.

Mr. Fazio represented to the Court that a bond is not in place, explained circumstances with respect to the procedures in his office versus the Sacramento office, and stated that the bond has been cancelled as of March 15, 2013 and that HCC will not reinstate the bond. Mr. Fazio also stated that the bond was written on a cancellable bond form. Ms. Aguilar explained circumstances and stated that she will try to purchase a bond from another bonding company. The Court admonished Ms. Aguilar with respect to her client's actions. Mr. Wise argued that the Trustee has not acted responsibly. The Court stated that it will not reduce bond, that bond is at $1,000,000.00, that it needs to be retroactive to March 15, 2013, and that Counsel needs to file the bond. Status on filing of bond is set for April 17, 2015 at 11:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Ms. Aguilar will appear by Court Call. The Court is prepared to suspend the Trustee's powers on that date if bond is not filed.

Judge: Lillian K. Sing. Clerk: Nancy Bautista/Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy M. Benton.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Payment Of Bond Premium
Off Calendar Apr-10-2013 Continued To Apr-15-13 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Richard Wise for Remainder People. Hope Aguilar (appearing by Court Call) for Dwight O'Reily. Paul Fazio (Bondsman).

Ms. Aguilar reported that they are still awaiting approval from the bondsman and that they are in the underwriting process with HDC Surety in Sacramento, CA. Mr. Wise raised the issue that there is an outstanding bond since July that needs to have the premium paid, and that Mr. O'Reilly must comply with the court order to do so. Ms. Aguilar stated that Mr. O'Reilly does not have the $5,000.00 needed to pay the premium and that the previous bond company is over charging her client. Mr. Fazio stated that there was no admittance by the bond company to over charging, and explained that the bond premium is higher if the Trust is not under Court supervision. The Court is inclined to suspend Mr. O'Reilly's powers because the fact is he is in violation of a court order and failed to pay the bond. The status on payment of bond premium was continued to April 15, 2013 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Proof of reinstatement of bond is due by April 12, 2013 at 3:00 p.m. The Court also stated that the bond needs to be retroactive to March 15, 2013. Ms. Aguilar is also to fax proof of reinstatement to Mr. Wise.

Judge: Lillian K. Sing. Clerk: Rosie Noguera/Nancy Bautista. Bailiff: Deputy M. Benton.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Payment Of Bond Premium
Off Calendar Mar-27-2013 Continued To Apr-10-13 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Richard Wise for RemainderPeople. Hope Aguilar (appearing by Court Call) for Patrick O'Riley.

The Court noted that the bond has lasped and subsequently been cancelled, and that in doing so this is a violation of the court order. Ms. Aguilar apologizes and acknowledges that she is aware of the situation and stated that she hopes to remedy this with her petition to reduce bond set for April 29, 2013 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept 204. Mr. Wise argued that the bond needs to be set in place prior to the upcoming hearing. The Court agrees that the bond needs to be reinstated. A status on bond is set for April 10, 2013 at 10:30 a.m., in Dept 204. Ms. Aguilar will appear by court call.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Ella Yip/Nancy Bautista. Bailiff: Deputy M. Benton.

Notice Of Petition And Petition For Permission To Purchase Property.
Off Calendar Nov-17-2011 Advanced From Jan-10-12 To Dec-07-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Notice Of Petition And Petition For Permission To Purchase Property.
Off Calendar Dec-28-2011 Denied
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Richard Wise for Remainder Beneficiaries. Anne Matlock for Pat Reilly (Petitioner).

Counsel presented oral argument to support their positions with regard to using Trust funds to purchase property and diversity of assets. The matter was taken under submission.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera/Ella Yip. Bailiff: Deputy A. Kendall.

Notice Of Petition And Petition For Permission To Purchase Property.
Off Calendar Dec-07-2011 Continued To Dec-14-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Ann-Leith Matlock for and with Pat Reilly (Trustee). Richard Wise for Remainderman Beneficiaries.

Counsel presented oral argument to support their positions. The Petition for Permission to Purchase Property was continued to December 14, 2011 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for Counsel to file further supporting documents.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera/Ella Yip.

Application And Notice Requesting Order Shortening Time For Date Of Hearing On Petition For Permission To Purchase Property
Off Calendar Nov-17-2011 Granted Per Written Order

PETITION FOR INSTRUCTIONS
Off Calendar Aug-30-2011 Denied
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Richard Wise for Michael O'Reilly. Philip Gunning for Dwight O'Reilly.

The matter was presented and argued. The Petition for Instructions was denied. Mr. Wise is to prepare the order.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy W. Yee.

PETITION FOR INSTRUCTIONS
Off Calendar Aug-15-2011 Continued To Aug-30-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Richard Wise for Michael O'Reilly and Siblings. Philip Gunning for Dwight O'Reilly.

Mr. Gunning did not stipulate to Commissioner Kaplan hearing the matter. The Petition for Instructions was continued to August 30, 2011 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge Pro Temp: Sue M. Kaplan. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy Brown.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of Sale And Proof Of Additional Bond
Off Calendar Aug-02-2011 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of Sale And Proof Of Additional Bond
Off Calendar Jul-26-2011 Continued To Aug-02-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Richard Wise for Michael O'Reilly and Siblings. Philip Gunning appeared by telephone for Dwight O'Reilly.

Mr. Gunning stated that the funds were in the process of being transferred as a pre-condition of the bond and that the Bond Representative requested a one week continuance. Mr. Wise stated that a one week continuance should be the maximum. Status of filing of the bond was continued to August 2, 2011 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. If the bond is filed by that date, the status hearing will go off calendar. If the bond is not filed by that date, a declaration by Mr. Gunning as to where the funds are is to be filed.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Payne.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of Sale And Proof Of Additional Bond
Off Calendar Jul-06-2011 Continued To Jul-26-11 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Richard Wise for Michael O'Reilly and Siblings. Philip Gunning for Patrick o'Reilly (Trustee).

Discussions were held with regard to the proceeds of the sale being in a secured account, the amount of bond and the $52,000.00 reimbursement to Patrick O'Reilly. The Parties arranged for issuance of a new bond (total replacement of the existing bond) in the amount of $1,000,000.00 with the assistance of Paul Fazio (Bond Agent) which will require transfer of the funds to UBS Bank. There will be an additional level by the Bank and the Bonding company of oversight of the funds and it will take up to two weeks for this to occur. The matter was continued to July 26, 2011 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for status of the bond. The funds ($748,000.00 and $50,000.00) are to remain at Fidelity until they are transfered to UBS Bank. The previous order/orders requiring that the funds be placed into a blocked account and setting bond at $1,600,000.00 are vacated. Mr. Gunning may appear by court call.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy R. Cabrera.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of Sale And Proof Of Additional Bond
Off Calendar Jun-28-2011 Continued To Jul-06-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Richard Wise for Michael O'Reilly.

The Court stated that the funds need to immediately be protected and put into a blocked account. Mr. Wise stated that he was advised by Mr. Gunning was not going to appear because he was out of town, that he received a declaration from Mr. Gunning that he wanted him to file but that it was not signed under penalty of perjury, that Mr. Gunning would be in the Bay Area between July 5th through July 25th, that the Trustee was having trouble obtaining a bond and that Paul (bond agent) was unable to contact Mr. Gunning. In addition, Mr. Wise stated that he was told that the funds were in the bank, that the closing statement shows the amount of $748,850.00 with a reimbursement check in the amount of $52,171.44 and that he told Mr. Gunning that under no circumstances is the Trustee is to do anything with the funds except preserve them in cash. The matter was continued to July 6, 2011 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. The Court will send an order out to Mr. Gunning.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Payne.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of Sale And Proof Of Additional Bond
Off Calendar Jun-14-2011 Continued To Jun-28-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

A Notice to Appear will be issued to the Attorney Philip Gunning to appear on June 28,2011 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to explain why the additional bond has not been filed. The matter was continued to June 28, 2011 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy R. Harrison.

Petition For Authority To Sell Real Property & Reduce Bond
Off Calendar May-20-2011 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Philip Gunning for Dwight O'Reilly.

The Court asked Mr. Gunning to refile his petition in its entirety. Mr. Gunning provided a copy of the Waiver of Notice from Mr. Wise on behalf of his Clients. The Court stated that it reviewed the declaration from Mr. Wise and that the declaration indicates that he does not oppose the sale of the real property as long as bond is set at $1,600,000.00. Mr. Gunning stated that he will come in with a petition to reduce bond. The Court granted the Petition for Authority to Sell Real Property with an additional bond in the amount of 1,600,000.00 (subject to review of the order).

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy Lazatin.

Petition For Authority To Sell Real Property & Reduce Bond
Off Calendar May-10-2011 Continued To May-17-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Philip Gunning for Dwight O'Reilly.

This matter was initially continued by the Probate Examiner to May 24, 2011 due to notice issues and the issue of bond. The Court noted that Mr. Wise (Attorney) was not present. Mr. Gunning appeared to object to the continuance, to express concern about the risk of losing the sale/purchaser and to present argument as to whether Francis' Heirs have any interest and why notice to them is not required. The Petition for Authority to Sell Real Property was continued to May 17, 2011 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to hear from Mr. Wise or to see if waivers are filed. Mr. Gunning is to contact Mr. Wise.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Payne.
